prompt:
Subject: Portrait of a woman wearing a golden afterglow
Person/Expression: 20s woman, glossy long black hair, center-parted with soft face-framing layers, delicate hair texture, translucent skin, calm eye contact, quiet and literary expression
Clothing/Pose: deep navy wrap-style V-neck dress, elegant and Japanese feminine silhouette, tiny diamond pendant at the neck, natural bust-up pose facing forward
Background/Light: Abstract gold leaf texture background based on black and gold, blurred brushstrokes and gold particles, soft shadows, cinematic warm light hitting the face faintly
Composition/Camera: Vertical portrait, central composition, framing from the chest up, 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, natural blur preserving background texture
Texture/Style: High definition, realistic skin texture, delicate highlights on black hair, Japanese natural makeup, brown eye makeup, rose beige lips, oil painting-like brushwork, soft-focus realistic AI photography
Negative: Low quality, unnatural face, distorted eyes, overexposure, too heavy Western-style makeup, Western model-like features, unnatural hair, text, logo, watermark
